data.description: The Russian Defense Ministry announced that on January 9, the Russian Aerospace Forces disabled the Lviv State Aviation Repair Plant with a strike from the "Orekhnik" missile system.
The Russian Defense Ministry reported that on January 9, the Russian Armed Forces struck the production facilities of two enterprises in Kyiv with missiles from the Iskander and Kalibr systems.

data.title: LPA secures anchor tenant and begins construction on fully leased 215,600 sq ft Building 400 at Parque Logístico Callao in Peru.
data.description: In Costa Rica, Logistic Properties of the Americas (NYSE American: LPA) disclosed a new deal today. The company, along with its subsidiaries, finalized a long-term lease agreement with a prominent regional packaging firm. This firm will serve as the main tenant for Building 400, currently under construction at Parque Logístico Callao in Peru. The upcoming Building 400 will offer around 215,600 square feet of gross leasable area.

The Lviv Aircraft Repair Plant, hit by a strike from "Orekhnik", was servicing F-16 and MiG-21 aircraft supplied to the Ukrainian Armed Forces by Western countries, the Russian Defense Ministry reported.

data.title: Study in CHEST shows Xenon MRI can predict cystic fibrosis exacerbations independently of spirometry.
data.description: A recently published study in the peer-reviewed journal CHEST revealed that ventilation defects identified through Xenon MRI scans can predict cystic fibrosis exacerbations independently of spirometry. The study emphasized the significance of these defects in predicting exacerbations, suggesting that they provide unique insights beyond traditional spirometry tests. This research underscores the importance of incorporating Xenon MRI scans in the management of cystic fibrosis patients to enhance predictive capabilities.

data.title: Hyperfine reports preliminary unaudited 2025 financial results with revenue details for the fourth quarter.
data.description: In Guilford, Connecticut, Hyperfine, Inc. (Nasdaq: HYPR) disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial data for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The innovative health technology company, renowned for its groundbreaking advancements in brain imaging through the FDA-cleared AI-powered portable MRI system named Swoop®, unveiled key figures. The unaudited revenue for the last quarter of 2025 was noted. Additionally, details regarding net cash burn and cash and cash equivalents for the same period were outlined.

data.title: BioMed Realty and TransMedics lease 498,000 sq ft at Assembly Innovation Park for medical tech operations.
data.description: In San Diego and Somerville, Massachusetts, a significant partnership has been formed between BioMed Realty, a leading operator of real estate for life science and technology sectors, and TransMedics Group, Inc. (ticker: TMDX), a prominent medical technology company specializing in revolutionizing organ transplant therapy for individuals battling end-stage lung, heart, and liver failure. The collaboration entails TransMedics leasing a substantial space of 498,000 square feet at Assembly Innovation Park, a top-tier location for life sciences.

data.title: a16z secures $15B, focusing on AI & crypto. They raised 18% of VC in 2025, aiming to offer opportunities for all.
data.description: In 2025, a16z secured more than 18% of the total venture capital funding, emphasizing their objective of providing equal opportunities to everyone. This figure signifies a substantial portion of the venture capital market being controlled by a16z. The company aims to level the playing field and ensure that individuals from all backgrounds have access to funding and support for their business ideas. This commitment to inclusivity and diversity in entrepreneurship is reflected in their significant share of the venture capital market.

data.title: Anumana adds Kevin Ballinger and Jean-Luc Butel to Board of Directors in Cambridge, Mass.
data.description: Anumana, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, recently appointed Kevin Ballinger and Jean-Luc Butel to its Board of Directors.

data.title: NTA introduces energy-efficient valve solutions to meet rising demands for speed, cost control, and sustainability in automation.
data.description: In Ningbo, China, on January 12, 2026, it was reported that pneumatic components are extensively utilized in factories due to their simplicity and dependability. With increasing needs for efficiency, cost management, and eco-friendliness, manufacturers are reevaluating the energy consumption of these systems. This change reflects the growing emphasis on optimizing energy usage in industrial settings.

data.title: HawkEye 360 launches Cluster 13 with 3 satellites, establishes initial communications. #SignalsIntelligence #Analytics
data.description: In Herndon, Virginia, on January 12, 2026, HawkEye 360, an esteemed provider of signals intelligence data and analytics worldwide, reported the triumphant deployment of its newest set of satellites known as Cluster 13. The company also verified the establishment of preliminary contact with the satellites post-launch. Cluster 13 comprises a trio of satellites, which were seamlessly integrated into orbit as part of this development.
